response.justification: The candidate is a strong full-stack and systems developer with an impressive breadth of experience, but their profile is a poor match for this role's core requirement: deep, current C++ expertise for industrial automation. Their professional C++ experience is limited to a ~7-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015; recent work centers on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang for web platforms. There is no evidence of IEC 62443/SDL practice, MQTT/industrial protocols, or message-broker architectures at industrial scale, and no demonstrated people-management experience for a Senior Manager position.
strengths: Low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (millions of HTTP req/s) using async I/O and concurrency at Dunnhumby
Strong engineering craft: TDD, CI/CD, testing tools authorship, and mentoring via workshops and courses
Broad polyglot background including some C/C++ and embedded/hardware exposure (robotic arms, audio thesis)
concerns: Minimal and outdated professional C++ experience; primary stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang
No industrial cybersecurity, SDL, or IEC 62443 exposure; no MQTT, OPC UA, or other listed protocols
No formal management or team-leadership track record for a Senior Manager role
